{{基礎情報 公家
| 氏名 = Takeiotake-no-Mikoto
| 画像 =
| 画像サイズ =
| 画像説明 =
| 時代 = {{ill|Ancient|ja|古代|lt=Ancient|lt_ja=上古}} / {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}
| 生誕 = Unknown
| 死没 = Unknown
| 改名 =
| 諡号 =
| 神号 =
| 戒名 =
| 墓所 = {{ill|Mori-Shōgunzuka Kofun|ja|森将軍塚古墳}} theory exists<ref name="jiten">[http://www.nihonjiten.com/data/263245.html Shinanu no Kuni no Miyatsuko (Shinano)] - Nihon Jiten (accessed July 6, 2018, at 4:29 AM {{ill|JST|ja|日本標準時|lt=JST|lt_ja=日本標準時}})</ref>
| 官位 = First {{ill|Shinanu no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|科野国造}}<ref>"{{ill|Kokuzō Hongi|ja|国造本紀}}," {{ill|Shinanu no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|科野国造}} section.</ref>
| 主君 = {{ill|Emperor Sujin|ja|崇神天皇}}
| 氏族 = {{ill|Ō clan|ja|多氏|lt=Ō-uji-zoku|lt_ja=多氏族}} (ancestor of the {{ill|Shinanu clan|ja|科野氏|lt=Shinanu-no-Kimi|lt_ja=科野君}}, {{ill|Kanasashi clan|ja|金刺氏|lt=Kanasashi-no-Toneri-no-Atai|lt_ja=金刺舎人直}}, {{ill|Osada clan|ja|他田氏|lt=Osada-no-Toneri-no-Atai|lt_ja=他田舎人直}}, etc.)
| 父母 =
| 兄弟 =
| 妻   =
| 子   =
| 特記事項 =
}}
'''Takeiotake-no-Mikoto''' (''takeiotake no mikoto'', ''takeiotatsu no mikoto''; {{ill|dates of birth and death unknown|ja|生没年不詳}}) was a {{ill|gōzoku|ja|豪族}} of the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} and the first '''{{ill|Shinanu no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|科野国造}}'''. In the "{{ill|Kokuzō Hongi|ja|国造本紀}}," he is recorded as '''Takeiotake-no-Mikoto'''.

== Overview ==
The "Kokuzō Hongi" of the ''{{ill|Sendai Kuji Hongi|ja|先代旧事本紀}}'' transmits that he was the grandson of {{ill|Kamuyaimimi-no-Mikoto|ja|神八井耳命}} and was appointed '''{{ill|Shinanu no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|科野国造}}''' during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Sujin|ja|崇神天皇|lt=Emperor Sujin|lt_ja=崇神朝}}. Related to this, there is a tradition that Takeiotake-no-Mikoto founded the {{ill|Shinano Ōmiyasha|ja|科野大宮社}}.

== Genealogy ==
Takeiotake-no-Mikoto is considered the grandson of {{ill|Kamuyaimimi-no-Mikoto|ja|神八井耳命}}<ref>''Sendai Kuji Hongi'' "Kokuzō Hongi," Shinanu no Kuni no Miyatsuko section.</ref>.

== Shrines Enshrining Him ==
*{{ill|Futago Shrine (Ueda)|ja|二子神社 (上田市)|lt=Futago Shrine|lt_ja=二子神社}} (Ueda, {{ill|Ueda, Nagano|ja|上田市|lt=Ueda City|lt_ja=上田市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}})
*{{ill|Susukimizu Shrine (Chikuma)|ja|須須岐水神社 (千曲市)|lt=Susukimizu Shrine|lt_ja=須々岐水神社}} precinct Hōri Shrine (Yashiro, {{ill|Chikuma, Nagano|ja|千曲市|lt=Chikuma City|lt_ja=千曲市}}, Nagano Prefecture)
*{{ill|Karasaki Shrine (Chikuma)|ja|唐崎神社 (千曲市)|lt=Karasaki Shrine|lt_ja=唐崎神社}} (Amemiya, Chikuma City, Nagano Prefecture)

== Footnotes ==
{{Reflist}}

== See also ==
*{{ill|kuni no miyatsuko|ja|国造}}
*{{ill|List of Figures from before the Asuka Period|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧}}


{{DEFAULTSORT:たけいおたけのみこと}}
[[Category:日本神話の人物]]
[[Category:古墳時代の人物]]
[[Category:古代日本の人物]]
[[Category:信濃国の人物]]
[[Category:長野県の歴史]]
[[Category:金刺氏]]
[[Category:多氏]]
[[Category:Kuni no miyatsuko]]
[[ja:武五百建命]]
